stemHtml: Which of the following is correct regarding false beams on a glide path?

options.a: False beams will only be found below the correct glide path.
options.b: False beams are only present when flying a back-beam ILS approach.
options.c: False beams will only be found more than 10 degrees to the left or to the right of the localiser centreline.
options.d: False beams will only be found above the correct glide path.
